_comment: Fully SYNTHETIC, generic commercial Master Services Agreement. No real client, counterparty, deal, person names, or real contract content. Invented for the F05b conceptual clause-search eval only.

candidates.heading: Definitions and Interpretation
candidates.snippet: In this Agreement the following capitalized terms have the meanings set out below; references to clauses are to clauses of this Agreement.

candidates.heading: Confidentiality
candidates.snippet: Each party shall keep secret and not disclose the other party's Confidential Information and shall use it solely to perform this Agreement.

candidates.heading: Term
candidates.snippet: This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues for an initial period of three years, renewing automatically for successive one-year terms.

candidates.heading: Termination
candidates.snippet: Either party may terminate this Agreement on written notice if the other commits a material breach that remains uncured for thirty days.

candidates.heading: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
candidates.snippet: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the stated jurisdiction and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of its courts for any dispute.

candidates.heading: Indemnification
candidates.snippet: Each party shall indemnify and hold harmless the other against third-party claims, losses and expenses arising from its breach or negligence.

candidates.heading: Limitation of Liability
candidates.snippet: Neither party is liable for indirect or consequential loss, and each party's aggregate liability is capped at the fees paid in the preceding twelve months.

candidates.heading: Assignment
candidates.snippet: Neither party may assign, transfer or subcontract its rights or obligations under this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party.

candidates.heading: Change of Control
candidates.snippet: If a party undergoes a change of control, merger or acquisition, the other party may terminate this Agreement on notice within sixty days.

candidates.heading: Fees and Payment
candidates.snippet: The Customer shall pay all undisputed invoices within thirty days of receipt; late amounts accrue interest at the stated rate.

candidates.heading: Force Majeure
candidates.snippet: Neither party is in breach for failure caused by events beyond its reasonable control, including natural disaster, war or governmental action.

candidates.heading: Notices
candidates.snippet: All formal notices must be in writing and delivered to the addresses set out in this Agreement by hand, courier or recorded post.

candidates.heading: Intellectual Property Rights
candidates.snippet: All intellectual property, including copyright in deliverables and inventions created under this Agreement, vests in the party stated in the Schedule.

candidates.heading: Representations and Warranties
candidates.snippet: Each party represents and warrants that it has full authority to enter into this Agreement and that doing so breaches no other obligation.

candidates.heading: Non-Competition and Non-Solicitation
candidates.snippet: During the term and for twelve months after, neither party shall solicit the other's employees or engage in directly competing activity.

candidates.heading: Data Protection and Privacy
candidates.snippet: Each party shall process personal data in accordance with applicable data protection law and implement appropriate technical and organizational measures.

candidates.heading: Entire Agreement
candidates.snippet: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties and supersedes all prior discussions, representations and understandings.

candidates.heading: Severability
candidates.snippet: If any provision is held invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions continue in full force and effect.

candidates.heading: Insurance
candidates.snippet: Each party shall maintain insurance with reputable insurers covering its liabilities under this Agreement to the minimum amounts stated.

candidates.heading: Appendix A: Service Levels
candidates.snippet: The service levels, availability targets and service credits applicable to the Services are set out in this Appendix.
